# SingleEntityTransactionBuilder&lt;TEntity&gt;.Load method

Associate a *TEntity*.

```csharp
public SingleEntityTransactionBuilder Load(TEntity entity)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |

## Return Value

The transaction builder.

## Remarks

Call this method to load an entity that already exists before calling [`Append`](./Append.md).
